tasks.title: Populate requirements.md document
tasks.description: Write the authoritative product requirements for ralph-loop-mcp into requirements.md. This file is the source of truth the loop reads to understand what to build; it is currently empty, which breaks the loop premise.

tasks.title: Add Phase 3 section to README
tasks.description: README.md documents Phase 1 and Phase 2 generator scripts but has no Phase 3 section. Add a 'Phase 3 generator script' section documenting ralph.generate_phase3, the phase3.sh output path, and the artifacts it creates; also update the Conventions section to mention phase3.sh.

tasks.title: Test replaceFixPlanMd merge logic
tasks.description: The replaceFixPlanMd function in workflow.ts handles complex carry-forward of completed and blocked tasks across fix_plan replacements but has no test coverage. Add a dedicated test suite covering merge, carry-forward, and no-preserve modes.

tasks.title: Test nextTask and task lifecycle tools
tasks.description: The nextTask, setTaskStatus, blockTask, and unblockTask tool functions in tools.ts are untested at the tool level. Add integration tests that write a fix_plan.md to a temp repo, call these tools via process.cwd mock, and verify the resulting file state.

tasks.title: Test readState tool function
tasks.description: The readState tool aggregates config, tasks, specs, PRD tail, and log tails into a single state snapshot but has no test coverage. Add tests for missing artifacts, populated state, and config validation propagation.

tasks.title: Test validateRalphConfig logic
tasks.description: validateRalphConfig is a key config-schema guard used in both readState and generatePhase2, but is not tested in isolation. Add unit tests for valid config, missing required fields, invalid types, and invalid paths.projectPlan values.

tasks.title: Test logging and epic plan tools
tasks.description: appendProgress, appendLearning, and writeEpicPlan tool functions in tools.ts are untested at the tool interface level. Add tests verifying timestamp formatting in progress entries, section heading in learning entries, and epic_plan.md write behavior.

tasks.title: Test listFiles and readFile tools
tasks.description: The listFiles and readFile tool functions exported from tools.ts have no test coverage. Add a test file covering happy path listing, sandbox path rejection, non-existent directory/file behavior, and the structured error return for missing files per FR-17, FR-18, and FR-19.

tasks.title: Test runVerification sequential execution
tasks.description: The runVerification tool implements the FR-08 sequential ci-then-test:e2e gate with stop-on-first-failure, but this behavior is untested at the tool level. Add unit tests using mocked runNpmScript to verify sequential execution, stop-on-failure short-circuit, the ok field, and configurable timeout propagation.

tasks.title: Test tool name normalization FR-20
tasks.description: FR-20 requires the MCP server to accept both ralph.tool_name and ralph_tool_name variants, normalizing to dot form before dispatch. The normalization logic in index.ts is untested. Add unit tests for the normalization function to verify both forms are dispatched correctly.

tasks.title: Complete upsertSpec FR-05 test coverage
tasks.description: upsert_spec_guard.test.ts covers only 2 of the 4 reserved filenames (progress.txt and learnings.md) and does not test the path-outside-.ralph/specs/ guard. Add test cases for progress.md and learnings.txt rejection, plus a sandbox path rejection case to fully satisfy FR-05.

tasks.title: Test configurable npm allowlist NFR-03
tasks.description: The getAllowedNpmScripts function reads custom allowedNpmScripts from config.json and merges them with the defaults, but no test verifies that a custom script added via config.json is accepted by runNpmScript instead of being rejected. Add tests in logging_and_allowlist.test.ts for the custom-script-from-config path and for config-extended scripts overriding the rejection guard.

tasks.title: Test writePrd and upsertSpec trailing newlines
tasks.description: NFR-05 requires all file output to end with a trailing newline. writePrd and upsertSpec both enforce this in implementation but have no test covering the 'adds newline when content lacks one' branch. Add targeted tests for both tools to complete NFR-05 coverage.
